title: solidago virgaurea subsp. kuhistanica
intro: Solidago virgaurea subsp. kuhistanica, also known as the Kuhistan goldenrod, is a subspecies of the Solidago virgaurea plant, a flowering plant in the aster family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Solidago virgaurea subsp. kuhistanica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
